sourceSummary.oneLine: SGS Korea test report for tesa 4942 and referenced tape items covering RoHS substances, phthalates, and halogen content.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supplier material compliance evidence for restricted substances and halogen content, with results limited to the submitted sample.
keyPoints: The submitted sample was identified as Product Name: tesa 4942, with client reference data 4983, 4972, 4980, 4982, 4928, 4967, and 4965.
Cadmium, lead, mercury, hexavalent chromium, PBBs/PBDEs, DEHP, DBP, BBP, DIBP, bromine, fluorine, and iodine were reported as N.D.
Chlorine was reported as 278 mg/kg using EN 14582:2016, IC.
The report states that results refer only to the sample unless otherwise stated.

evidence.evidenceText: Issued Date : 2018. 12. 04 Test Report No. F690101/LF-CTSAYAA18-62794

evidence.claim: The submitted product name was tesa 4942.
The report includes client reference data for 4983, 4972, 4980, 4982, 4928, 4967, and 4965.
Cadmium, lead, mercury, and hexavalent chromium were reported as N.D.
evidence.evidenceText: Cadmium (Cd) N.D.; Lead (Pb) N.D.; Mercury (Hg) N.D.; Hexavalent Chromium (Cr VI)* N.D.

evidence.claim: PBB and PBDE flame retardants listed in the report were reported as N.D.
evidence.evidenceText: Flame Retardants-PBBs/PBDEs ... Monobromobiphenyl N.D. ... Decabromodiphenyl ether N.D.

evidence.claim: DEHP, DBP, BBP, and DIBP phthalates were reported as N.D.
evidence.evidenceText: Di-(2-ethylhexyl) phthalate (DEHP) N.D.; Di-butyl phthalate (DBP) N.D.; Benzyl butyl phthalate (BBP) N.D.; Di-isobutyl phthalate (DIBP) N.D.

evidence.claim: Bromine, fluorine, and iodine were reported as N.D.; chlorine was reported as 278 mg/kg.
evidence.evidenceText: Bromine(Br) N.D.; Chlorine(Cl) 278 mg/kg; Fluorine(F) N.D.; Iodine(I) N.D.

evidence.claim: Halogen content testing was performed with reference to EN 14582:2016 using IC.
Phthalate testing was performed with reference to IEC 62321-8:2017 using GC/MS.
The results shown in the test report refer only to the sample unless otherwise stated.
evidence.evidenceText: Unless otherwise stated the results shown in this test report refer only to the sample(s).

reviewFlags.reason: Authority is a testing laboratory, SGS Korea Co., Ltd.; no regulatory authority or jurisdictional approval body is identified.
Item No./Part No. and Materials are stated as N/A.
The extracted test period appears inconsistent: '2018. 12. 04 to 2018. 11. 29'.
Document revision/version appears as 'F401 Version4' in the footer; the text does not state whether this is the report revision or form version.
